titleStmt.title: SII 34.108: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 108. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north and west walls of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records a sale of land by the sabhā of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to Chāttaṉ Taṇakkaṉ of Chiṟuvāli-nāḍu who set up the image of Umābhaṭṭāraki in the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr-Āḻvār. The sabhā made the land tax-free on receiving the tax capital from the purchaser.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kOpparakEcari paṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭa caturvveti maṅkalattu
pperuṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Eṅkaṇṇilam Ivvūrk kuḷattukkīḻ śrīkaṇṭavā ykkālukku mēkku Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟup
palāṟṟukku vaṭakku Eṭṭām pāṭakaṅ kaliyaṅkūṟṟa nuḷḷiṭṭa dvādaśakkattukku vaṭakku mēlpāṟkellai kollaṉum tacca paṉai
yaṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellaiy kiḷiyūr vāykkālukkut teṟkum kīḻpāṟkkellaiy cuvaraṉālaṉ U
ḷḷiṭṭa dvādaśakkattiṉ mēlaikkaṇṇāṟṟukku mēṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam mikitikkuṟaimaiy Uḷ
ḷaṭaṅka Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi tiruveṟumpiyūrāḻvār Umā bhaṭṭārakiyāraiy Eḻuntaruḷuvitta ciṟuvāli nāṭṭu nāṭṭu maṉṟāṭi cāttaṉ taṇakkaṉukku vi
ṟṟuk kuṭuttukkoṇṭa tīppōkkuc cempoṉ kaḻañcil pērttu Uraiyun tuḷaiyum vaḻuvātatu Ivvūrāṭukkallāṟk koṇṭa poṉ pa
tiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Iṉ nilattukkēy Iṟaikāval koṇṭapoṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻaiñcum Ākap poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻaiñcu Immup
patiṉkaḻaiñcu poṉnukkum Iccuṭṭappaṭṭanilam cantrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka śilālēkai ceytu koḷḷap peṟuvatāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇa
mum poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷc celvōlaiyāvatākavum Itallatu vēṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip po
ṭṭi yāvaṇakkaḷiyē poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttōm tiruverumpiyūrāḻvā
rumāpaṭṭārakiyārai
Digital edition of SII 34.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
